2603.10430.title: Domain-Adaptive Health Indicator Learning with Degradation-Stage Synchronized Sampling and Cross-Domain Autoencoder
2603.10430.paper_summary: The construction of high quality health indicators (HIs) is crucial for effective prognostics and health management. Although deep learning has significantly advanced HI modeling, existing approaches often struggle with distribution mismatches resulting from varying operating conditions. Although domain adaptation is typically employed to mitigate these shifts, two critical challenges remain: (1) the misalignment of degradation stages during random mini-batch sampling, resulting in misleading discrepancy losses, and (2) the structural limitations of small-kernel 1D-CNNs in capturing long-range temporal dependencies within complex vibration signals. To address these issues, we propose a domain-adaptive framework comprising degradation stage synchronized batch sampling (DSSBS) and the cross-domain aligned fusion large autoencoder (CAFLAE). DSSBS utilizes kernel change-point detection to segment degradation stages, ensuring that source and target mini-batches are synchronized by their failure phases during alignment. Complementing this, CAFLAE integrates large-kernel temporal feature extraction with cross-attention mechanisms to learn superior domain-invariant representations. The proposed framework was rigorously validated on a Korean defense system dataset and the XJTU-SY bearing dataset, achieving an average performance enhancement of 24.1% over state-of-the-art methods. These results demonstrate that DSSBS improves cross-domain alignment through stage-consistent sampling, whereas CAFLAE offers a high-performance backbone for long-term industrial condition monitoring.
2603.10430.paper_summary_zh: 高品質健康指標（HIs）的建構對於有效的預測和健康管理至關重要。儘管深度學習在HI建模方面已經取得了顯著進展，但現有方法常常面臨由於操作條件變化而導致的分佈不匹配問題。儘管通常會採用領域適應來減輕這些變化，但仍然存在兩個關鍵挑戰：（1）隨機小批量抽樣過程中退化階段的不對齊，導致誤導性的差異損失，以及（2）小核1D-CNN在捕捉複雜振動信號中的長期時間依賴性方面的結構限制。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了一個域適應框架，包括退化階段同步批量抽樣（DSSBS）和跨域對齊融合大型自編碼器（CAFLAE）。DSSBS利用核變更點檢測來劃分退化階段，確保源和目標小批量在對齊過程中根據其故障階段進行同步。作為補充，CAFLAE將大型核時間特徵提取與跨注意力機制相結合，以學習更優越的域不變表示。該框架在韓國防禦系統數據集和XJTU-SY軸承數據集上進行了嚴格驗證，實現了比最先進方法平均提高24.1%的性能。這些結果表明，DSSBS通過階段一致的抽樣改善了跨域對齊，而CAFLAE則為長期工業狀況監測提供了高性能的骨幹。
2603.10430.author: Jungho Choo et.al.
2603.10430.authors: Jungho Choo, Hanbyeol Park, Gawon Lee, Yunkyung Park, Hyerim Bae
